mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that raises equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS rises by > 0.5pp in 3 months, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment rate above 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that depress corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or UNRATE declines while SPX rises by > 2% in 20 days.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and housing starts signal weak aggregate demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days through reduced corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 55% of cases where INDPRO and HOUST both decline by > 2% in 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in industrial production relative to its 12-month moving average indicates supply chain disruptions that raise inflationary pressures and lower equity valuations over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or INDPRO volatility drops below 1.0% in 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent disinflation (CPI decline) alongside falling Treasury yields signals deflationary risks that depress equity earnings multiples, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of cases where CPIAUCSL declines > 0.3% and FEDFUNDS falls > 0.2pp.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k jobs signals inflationary labor market pressures that prompt monetary policy tightening, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or PAYEMS volatility drops below 20k in 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in consumer spending (RSAFS) following a multi-month decline indicates recovering demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings outlook.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 55% of cases where RSAFS rebounds > 3% from 3-month low.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in industrial production combined with rising commodity prices signals stagflationary pressures that create negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of cases where INDPRO declines > 1.5% and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.4% in 3 months.
